value_chain_position: Physical operations intelligence platform — sells IoT telematics hardware and AI-analytics SaaS to commercial fleets and industrial worksites; the operating system for connected physical operations.
relative_comps: Samsara has built a multi-product telematics-to-AI-video platform with 35% 3-year CAGR and 30% YoY growth — rare for a hardware+SaaS hybrid at $1.7B revenue. NRR above 115% indicates the platform stickiness. Primary competition is fragmented: Geotab in Europe/Canada, Verizon Connect, and Mobileye at the vision layer. None matches Samsara's integrated GPS+video+AI+compliance stack at its customer scale. FCF margin of 14% is building; operating leverage is visible. The AI infrastructure theme hint is incorrect — Samsara's value is in robotics/automation (physical operations AI), not compute infrastructure.
